description_long: This arcade game cabinet features a classic upright design with a predominantly blue exterior and vibrant, colorful artwork on the side panels. The front face includes a control panel with multiple buttons and a joystick, a coin slot area, and a large display screen set within a bezel. The marquee at the top displays bold, eye-catching graphics and text, contributing to the retro gaming aesthetic. The side panels are adorned with detailed illustrations, likely referencing the game featured within the cabinet, and are framed by a red border. The back of the cabinet is plain and black, likely for maintenance access, and the overall structure is boxy and robust, typical of vintage arcade machines.
description: A blue upright arcade game cabinet with colorful side artwork, a control panel with buttons and joystick, a coin slot, and a vibrant marquee at the top.
description_view_0: Front view showing the control panel, coin slot, display screen, and marquee artwork.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the detailed side panel artwork with a red border.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, solid black back panel.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, with matching side panel artwork and red border.
attribute_screen_type: CRT display, slightly curved, medium size with a visible bezel around the screen.
attribute_control_panel_layout: Single-player layout with one joystick and multiple colored buttons arranged in a row, with a blue and red color scheme.
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present; features bold, colorful graphics and text with a retro gaming theme, prominently displayed at the top of the cabinet.
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Both side panels feature vibrant, cartoon-style artwork with characters and action scenes, framed by a red border.
